title: Junior DevOps Engineer
description:
We are seeking a highly motivated Junior DevOps Engineer to join our team. As a Junior DevOps Engineer, you will play a critical role in ensuring the smooth operation of our systems and infrastructure.

Responsibilities:
- Design, implement, and maintain scalable and secure infrastructure
- Collaborate with development teams to ensure seamless deployment of applications
- Monitor and troubleshoot system performance issues
- Develop and maintain automation scripts to streamline processes
- Ensure compliance with industry standards and best practices

Must-have skills:
- Linux
- Kubernetes
- Node.js
- Python
- Terraform
- Ansible
- Networking fundamentals
- CI/CD principles

Nice to have:
- Experience with containerization (Docker)
- Knowledge of agile development methodologies
- Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools (Prometheus, ELK Stack)
